name: team_memory_read
description: Read and retrieve data from the team's shared memory. Use this to access previously stored information, workflow state, learned patterns, or any data saved during previous team executions. You can read specific contexts (workflow, session, persistent, shared) or search across all team memory. Team context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

context.description: Memory context to read from - workflow for current task state, session for temporary data, persistent for long-term learned patterns, shared for team-shared data, or all for everything

path.description: Specific JSON path to retrieve (e.g., 'contexts.workflow.current_step' or 'contexts.shared.team_preferences')

search_query.description: Search for memory entries containing this text or pattern

limit.description: Maximum number of memory entries to return when searching
